auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Semrush API key passed as the key query parameter. Find it in Subscription info > API units: https://www.semrush.com/accounts/subscription-info/api-units/

actions.name: get_domain_overview
actions.description: Get Semrush domain overview metrics from a regional SEO database.

domain.description: The domain name to analyze, such as example.com.

database.description: The Semrush regional database code, such as us, uk, de, or mobile-us.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for requesting a Semrush domain overview report.

anyOf.description: A text Semrush CSV field value.
A numeric Semrush CSV field value.
A blank Semrush CSV field value.

additionalProperties.description: One parsed Semrush CSV field value.

items.description: One normalized Semrush CSV row keyed by Semrush column name.

rows.description: The report rows returned by Semrush.

totalRows.description: The number of rows returned by Semrush.

rawHeader.description: The raw Semrush CSV header columns.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Semrush CSV report response.

actions.name: list_domain_organic_keywords
actions.description: List organic search keywords for a domain from a Semrush regional database.

domain.description: The domain name to analyze, such as example.com.

database.description: The Semrush regional database code, such as us, uk, de, or mobile-us.

display_limit.description: The maximum number of Semrush rows to request.

display_offset.description: The one-based Semrush row offset to start from.

display_date.description: The Semrush historical snapshot date in YYYYMM15 format when the report supports it.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for requesting Semrush domain organic keyword rows.

anyOf.description: A text Semrush CSV field value.
A numeric Semrush CSV field value.
A blank Semrush CSV field value.

additionalProperties.description: One parsed Semrush CSV field value.

items.description: One normalized Semrush CSV row keyed by Semrush column name.

rows.description: The report rows returned by Semrush.

totalRows.description: The number of rows returned by Semrush.

rawHeader.description: The raw Semrush CSV header columns.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Semrush CSV report response.

domain.description: The domain name to analyze, such as example.com.

database.description: The Semrush regional database code, such as us, uk, de, or mobile-us.

display_limit.description: The maximum number of Semrush rows to request.

display_offset.description: The one-based Semrush row offset to start from.

display_date.description: The Semrush historical snapshot date in YYYYMM15 format when the report supports it.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for requesting Semrush organic competitor rows.

anyOf.description: A text Semrush CSV field value.
A numeric Semrush CSV field value.
A blank Semrush CSV field value.

additionalProperties.description: One parsed Semrush CSV field value.

items.description: One normalized Semrush CSV row keyed by Semrush column name.

rows.description: The report rows returned by Semrush.

totalRows.description: The number of rows returned by Semrush.

rawHeader.description: The raw Semrush CSV header columns.

outputSchema.description: The normalized Semrush CSV report response.
